description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a mix of brick, wood, and glass materials. The front facade includes large windows, a driveway with space for two cars, and a small porch area. The backyard is landscaped with a lawn, trees, a patio, and a swimming pool, providing ample outdoor living space. The roof is a combination of gable and flat sections, with the main structure rising to two stories. The property is enclosed by low walls and includes both paved and green areas. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with grouped windows on the front and side elevations.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with brick, wood, and glass exterior, featuring a landscaped backyard, driveway, and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch, and large front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, brickwork, and backyard landscaping with pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, swimming pool, and garden areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof section, additional windows, and garage area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
